scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,seller,admin -c green,yellow,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:seller" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w apps/seller && npm run build -w apps/admin
scripts.build:functions: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w functions
scripts.dev:emulator: concurrently -n emulator,seed,server,seller,admin -c blue,gray,green,yellow,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run emulators" "npm run db:seed:wait" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:seller" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.firebase:deploy: npm run build && npm run build:functions && firebase deploy
